results.title: Global expansion is no longer about reducing information costs, it’s about reducing trust costs
results.description: For decades, globalisation followed a predictable economic logic. Technology lowered the cost of communication, cloud computing reduced infrastructure costs, SaaS standardised business processes, and AI is now making information almost free. Every major wave of innovation has reduced the friction of doing business across borders. results.title: 42 Interesting And Fun Psychological Tricks To Try On Someone
results.description: Humans may be clever enough to travel into space and cure diseases, but even the sharpest minds can still be surprisingly easy to fool. Across a couple of Reddit threads, users shared fun psychology tricks that rely on conditioning, suggestion, and predictable human behavior. From harmless confusion to clever little experiments, these ideas might be worth trying on friends or family just to see what happens. Just remember to use your newfound powers for good.

results.title: Rays homer three times to down Blue Jays 7-1 in series opener at Rogers Centre
results.description: TORONTO - When Vladimir Guerrero Jr. struck out with Ernie Clement on first and one out in the eighth inning, there were plenty of dissenters among the 40,837 fans at Rogers Centre on Monday night.
